step_rationale: Th17 master regulator; drives IL-17 production and adaptive immune plaque inflammation.
mechanism: RORγt directs Th17 differentiation and IL-17 secretion, amplifying plaque inflammation and destabilization.

references.title: Elevated-GlcNAcylation enhances pro-inflammatory Th17 function by altering the intracellular lipid microenvironment.
